name: @agentclientprotocol/sdk
description: The Agent Client Protocol (ACP) is a protocol that standardizes communication between *code editors* (interactive programs for viewing and editing source code) and *coding agents* (programs that use generative AI to autonomously modify code).

metadata.description: The Agent Client Protocol (ACP) is a protocol that standardizes communication between *code editors* (interactive programs for viewing and editing source code) and *coding agents* (programs that use generative AI to autonomously modify code).
